---
title: "椭圆：两焦点的舞蹈"
subtitle: "模块一 · 第2课"
date: 2026-03-22
---

用两根钉子和一根线就能画椭圆。把线的两端固定在钉子上，用铅笔绷紧线，绕一圈——你画出的就是一个完美的椭圆。这根线的长度不变，就是椭圆最本质的秘密。

## 探索问题

::: {.callout-tip}
## 先想一想

把两根钉子钉在纸上，相距10厘米。取一根长15厘米的线，两端系在钉子上。用铅笔绷紧线画一圈。

1. 画出来的图形是什么形状？
2. 如果我们把两根钉子靠得更近（比如相距2厘米），画出来的形状会有什么变化？
3. 如果两根钉子重合在一起呢？
:::

## 几何直觉：椭圆的定义

### 动画1：拖动点 P，验证距离之和

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_ellipse_sum"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_ellipse_sum_info">拖动椭圆上的蓝色点 P</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 420, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cx = w / 2, cy = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_ellipse_sum").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const a = 200, b = 130;
  const c = Math.sqrt(a * a - b * b);
  const f1 = {x: cx - c, y: cy};
  const f2 = {x: cx + c, y: cy};

  // Axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // Ellipse path
  const ellipsePoints = d3.range(0, 2 * Math.PI + 0.05, 0.03).map(t => [
    cx + a * Math.cos(t), cy + b * Math.sin(t)
  ]);
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line()(ellipsePoints) + "Z")
    .attr("fill", "rgba(45,112,179,0.08)").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // Foci
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f1.x).attr("cy", f1.y).attr("r", 6).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f2.x).attr("cy", f2.y).attr("r", 6).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f1.x).attr("y", f1.y + 22).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₁");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f2.x).attr("y", f2.y + 22).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₂");

  // Rubber band lines
  const line1 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  const line2 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // Distance labels on lines
  const dist1Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#e67e22").attr("font-weight", "bold");
  const dist2Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#27ae60").attr("font-weight", "bold");

  // Sum display
  const sumDisplay = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "18px").attr("font-weight", "bold").attr("fill", "#2d70b3");

  const constDisplay = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 55).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#888");

  // Draggable point P
  let theta = Math.PI / 4;
  const pointP = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 10).attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("stroke", "white").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("cursor", "pointer");

  const pointLabel = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "16px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("font-weight", "bold").text("P");

  function updateP(px, py) {
    // Snap to ellipse: find closest theta
    const dx = (px - cx) / a, dy = (py - cy) / b;
    theta = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
    const ex = cx + a * Math.cos(theta);
    const ey = cy + b * Math.sin(theta);

    pointP.attr("cx", ex).attr("cy", ey);
    pointLabel.attr("x", ex + 15).attr("y", ey - 10);

    line1.attr("x1", f1.x).attr("y1", f1.y).attr("x2", ex).attr("y2", ey);
    line2.attr("x1", f2.x).attr("y1", f2.y).attr("x2", ex).attr("y2", ey);

    const d1 = Math.sqrt((ex - f1.x) ** 2 + (ey - f1.y) ** 2);
    const d2 = Math.sqrt((ex - f2.x) ** 2 + (ey - f2.y) ** 2);

    dist1Label.attr("x", (f1.x + ex) / 2 - 15).attr("y", (f1.y + ey) / 2 - 8)
      .text(`${(d1 / 50).toFixed(2)}`);
    dist2Label.attr("x", (f2.x + ex) / 2 + 10).attr("y", (f2.y + ey) / 2 - 8)
      .text(`${(d2 / 50).toFixed(2)}`);

    sumDisplay.text(`|PF₁| + |PF₂| = ${((d1 + d2) / 50).toFixed(2)}`);
    constDisplay.text(`2a = ${(2 * a / 50).toFixed(2)}（始终相等！）`);

    document.getElementById("m1_ellipse_sum_info").textContent =
      `|PF₁| = ${(d1/50).toFixed(2)}, |PF₂| = ${(d2/50).toFixed(2)}, 和 = ${((d1+d2)/50).toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  const drag = d3.drag()
    .on("drag", function(event) {
      updateP(event.x, event.y);
    });

  pointP.call(drag);
  updateP(cx + a * Math.cos(theta), cy + b * Math.sin(theta));
})();
</script>
```

拖动蓝色点 P 在椭圆上移动。注意观察：无论 P 在椭圆的什么位置，$|PF_1| + |PF_2|$ 的值**始终不变**，等于 $2a$。这就是椭圆的几何定义。

### 动画2：离心率改变形状

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_ellipse_ecc"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>离心率 e：</label>
  <input type="range" id="m1_ecc_slider" min="0" max="99" value="50" step="1">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_ecc_val">e = 0.50</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 380, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cxView = w / 2, cyView = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_ellipse_ecc").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  // Fixed axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cyView).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cyView)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cxView).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cxView).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  const ellipsePath = svg.append("path")
    .attr("fill", "rgba(45,112,179,0.1)").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5);

  const focus1 = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  const focus2 = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  const f1Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("F₁");
  const f2Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("F₂");

  const shapeLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "16px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("font-weight", "bold");

  const aFixed = 180;

  function update(eVal) {
    const e = eVal / 100;
    const aLen = aFixed;
    const bLen = aLen * Math.sqrt(1 - e * e);
    const cLen = aLen * e;

    const pts = d3.range(0, 2 * Math.PI + 0.05, 0.03).map(t => [
      cxView + aLen * Math.cos(t), cyView + bLen * Math.sin(t)
    ]);
    ellipsePath.transition().duration(50)
      .attr("d", d3.line()(pts) + "Z");

    focus1.attr("cx", cxView - cLen).attr("cy", cyView);
    focus2.attr("cx", cxView + cLen).attr("cy", cyView);
    f1Label.attr("x", cxView - cLen - 10).attr("y", cyView + 20);
    f2Label.attr("x", cxView + cLen + 5).attr("y", cyView + 20);

    let desc = "";
    if (e === 0) desc = "完美的圆";
    else if (e < 0.3) desc = "接近圆的椭圆";
    else if (e < 0.7) desc = "标准椭圆";
    else if (e < 0.9) desc = "比较扁的椭圆";
    else desc = "非常扁，接近线段";

    shapeLabel.text(desc);
    document.getElementById("m1_ecc_val").textContent = `e = ${e.toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  const slider = document.getElementById("m1_ecc_slider");
  slider.addEventListener("input", () => update(+slider.value));
  update(50);
})();
</script>
```

当 $e=0$ 时，两个焦点重合，椭圆变成**圆**。当 $e$ 接近1时，椭圆越来越扁，最终退化为一条线段。地球绕太阳的轨道离心率只有0.017——几乎是圆形的。

## 生活中的曲线

::: {.callout-note}
## 椭圆在生活中

- **行星轨道**：所有行星绕太阳运动的轨道都是椭圆，太阳位于一个焦点
- **耳语廊**：椭圆形大厅中，站在一个焦点说悄悄话，站在另一个焦点的人能清楚听到——声波从一个焦点反射后全部汇聚到另一个焦点
- **碎石机**：医学上用椭圆反射原理粉碎肾结石，将冲击波从一个焦点聚焦到另一个焦点
- **鸡蛋的形状**近似椭圆（严格来说是卵形线）
:::

### 耳语廊效应（Whispering Gallery）

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_whisper"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <button id="m1_whisper_play">播放声波 ▶</button>
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_whisper_info">从 F₁ 发出声波，经椭圆壁反射后汇聚到 F₂</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 380, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cx = w / 2, cy = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_whisper").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const a = 260, b = 150;
  const c = Math.sqrt(a * a - b * b);
  const f1 = {x: cx - c, y: cy};
  const f2 = {x: cx + c, y: cy};

  // Elliptical room — filled wall
  const numPts = 200;
  const ellipsePoints = d3.range(0, numPts + 1).map(i => {
    const t = (i / numPts) * 2 * Math.PI;
    return [cx + a * Math.cos(t), cy + b * Math.sin(t)];
  });
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line()(ellipsePoints) + "Z")
    .attr("fill", "rgba(45,112,179,0.04)")
    .attr("stroke", "#5a4e3c").attr("stroke-width", 5);

  // Room interior floor pattern
  svg.append("ellipse").attr("cx", cx).attr("cy", cy).attr("rx", a - 10).attr("ry", b - 10)
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1).attr("stroke-dasharray", "3,6");

  // Foci markers
  [{p: f1, label: "F₁ 说话者", color: "#c74440"},
   {p: f2, label: "F₂ 听者", color: "#2d70b3"}].forEach(d => {
    svg.append("circle").attr("cx", d.p.x).attr("cy", d.p.y).attr("r", 8)
      .attr("fill", d.color).attr("stroke", "white").attr("stroke-width", 2);
    svg.append("text").attr("x", d.p.x).attr("y", d.p.y + 26)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "13px")
      .attr("fill", d.color).attr("font-weight", "bold").text(d.label);
  });

  // Precompute ray-ellipse intersection for a ray from f1 at angle theta
  function rayHitEllipse(angle) {
    // Parametric ray: (f1.x + t*cos(angle), f1.y + t*sin(angle))
    // On ellipse: ((x-cx)/a)^2 + ((y-cy)/b)^2 = 1
    const dx = Math.cos(angle), dy = Math.sin(angle);
    const ox = f1.x - cx, oy = f1.y - cy;
    const A = (dx * dx) / (a * a) + (dy * dy) / (b * b);
    const B = 2 * ((ox * dx) / (a * a) + (oy * dy) / (b * b));
    const C = (ox * ox) / (a * a) + (oy * oy) / (b * b) - 1;
    const disc = B * B - 4 * A * C;
    if (disc < 0) return null;
    const t = (-B + Math.sqrt(disc)) / (2 * A);
    if (t < 5) return null;
    return {x: f1.x + t * dx, y: f1.y + t * dy};
  }

  // Choose ray angles — fan out from F1
  const rayAngles = [-65, -45, -30, -15, 0, 15, 30, 45, 65].map(d => d * Math.PI / 180);
  const rayData = rayAngles.map(angle => {
    const hit = rayHitEllipse(angle);
    return hit ? {angle, hit} : null;
  }).filter(Boolean);

  const animGroup = svg.append("g");

  // Expanding wavefront circle (clipped to ellipse)
  const clipId = "m1_whisper_clip";
  svg.append("defs").append("clipPath").attr("id", clipId)
    .append("path").attr("d", d3.line()(ellipsePoints) + "Z");

  let playing = false;

  function playAnimation() {
    if (playing) return;
    playing = true;
    animGroup.selectAll("*").remove();

    // Phase 1: Expanding wavefront from F1
    const wavefront = animGroup.append("circle")
      .attr("cx", f1.x).attr("cy", f1.y).attr("r", 0)
      .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#c74440").attr("stroke-width", 2)
      .attr("opacity", 0.6).attr("clip-path", `url(#${clipId})`);

    const maxR = Math.sqrt((f2.x - f1.x) ** 2 + (a + b) ** 2);
    wavefront.transition().duration(1200).ease(d3.easeLinear)
      .attr("r", maxR).attr("opacity", 0.15);

    // Phase 2: Show reflection rays from wall to F2
    rayData.forEach((rd, i) => {
      // Ray from F1 to wall
      const ray1 = animGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", f1.x).attr("y1", f1.y)
        .attr("x2", f1.x).attr("y2", f1.y)
        .attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 1.5).attr("opacity", 0.7);

      ray1.transition().delay(200 + i * 60).duration(600).ease(d3.easeLinear)
        .attr("x2", rd.hit.x).attr("y2", rd.hit.y);

      // Bounce point
      animGroup.append("circle")
        .attr("cx", rd.hit.x).attr("cy", rd.hit.y).attr("r", 0)
        .attr("fill", "#e67e22")
        .transition().delay(800 + i * 60).duration(150).attr("r", 4)
        .transition().duration(1500).attr("r", 2).attr("opacity", 0.5);

      // Ray from wall to F2
      const ray2 = animGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", rd.hit.x).attr("y1", rd.hit.y)
        .attr("x2", rd.hit.x).attr("y2", rd.hit.y)
        .attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 1.5).attr("opacity", 0.7);

      ray2.transition().delay(900 + i * 60).duration(600).ease(d3.easeLinear)
        .attr("x2", f2.x).attr("y2", f2.y);
    });

    // Phase 3: Converging wavefront at F2
    const convergeFront = animGroup.append("circle")
      .attr("cx", f2.x).attr("cy", f2.y).attr("r", 80)
      .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5)
      .attr("opacity", 0).attr("clip-path", `url(#${clipId})`);

    convergeFront.transition().delay(1500).duration(200).attr("opacity", 0.6)
      .transition().duration(800).ease(d3.easeCubicIn)
      .attr("r", 0).attr("opacity", 0.9);

    // Pulse at F2
    animGroup.append("circle")
      .attr("cx", f2.x).attr("cy", f2.y).attr("r", 0)
      .attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("opacity", 0)
      .transition().delay(2500).duration(100).attr("opacity", 0.7).attr("r", 5)
      .transition().duration(600).attr("r", 30).attr("opacity", 0);

    // Info update
    setTimeout(() => {
      document.getElementById("m1_whisper_info").textContent =
        "声波从 F₁ 出发 → 经椭圆壁反射 → 全部汇聚到 F₂！";
    }, 1600);

    setTimeout(() => { playing = false; }, 3200);
  }

  document.getElementById("m1_whisper_play").addEventListener("click", playAnimation);
})();
</script>
```

从一个焦点 $F_1$ 发出的声波，碰到椭圆形墙壁后反射，**全部汇聚到另一个焦点** $F_2$。这就是世界各地"耳语廊"的秘密——伦敦圣保罗大教堂、北京天坛回音壁都利用了类似的原理。

## Desmos探索

```{=html}
<div id="m1_02_desmos" class="desmos-container"></div>
<script src="https://www.desmos.com/api/v1.9/calculator.js?apiKey=dcb31709b452b1cf9dc26972add0fda6"></script>
<script>
  var m1_02_calc = Desmos.GraphingCalculator(document.getElementById('m1_02_desmos'), {
    expressions: true, settingsMenu: false
  });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'a', latex: 'a = 3', sliderBounds: { min: 1, max: 5, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'b', latex: 'b = 2', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 5, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'ellipse', latex: '\\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \\frac{y^2}{b^2} = 1', color: '#2d70b3' });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'c_val', latex: 'c = \\sqrt{a^2 - b^2}' });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'f1', latex: '(-c, 0)', color: '#c74440', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 8 });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'f2', latex: '(c, 0)', color: '#c74440', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 8 });
  m1_02_calc.setExpression({ id: 'ecc', latex: 'e = \\frac{c}{a}' });
  m1_02_calc.setMathBounds({ left: -7, right: 7, bottom: -5, top: 5 });
</script>
```

调节 $a$ 和 $b$，观察焦点位置和离心率的变化。注意：当 $a < b$ 时，焦点在哪条轴上？

## 参考视频

```{=html}
<div class="video-switch">
  <button class="active" onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-bilibili').classList.add('active')">📺 B站原版</button>
  <button onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-github').classList.add('active')">💾 GitHub镜像</button>
</div>
<div class="video-panel">
  <div class="video-source vs-bilibili active">
    <div class="video-container"><iframe src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV1wP4y1273G&page=1" scrolling="no" border="0" frameborder="no" framespacing="0" allowfullscreen="true" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;"></iframe></div>
  </div>
  <div class="video-source vs-github">
    <div class="video-container">
      <video controls preload="metadata" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;">
        <source src="https://github.com/ymote/conics/releases/download/v1.0/01_.mp4" type="video/mp4">
      </video>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 关键帧

![椭圆的两焦点定义](../images/ch01/frame_01.jpg)

![距离之和保持不变](../images/ch01/frame_02.jpg)

![离心率与椭圆形状](../images/ch01/frame_03.jpg)

![椭圆的焦点反射性质](../images/ch01/frame_04.jpg)

## 高考真题

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2017年 全国I卷 第4题

已知椭圆 $C: \dfrac{x^2}{4}+\dfrac{y^2}{3}=1$，$F_1, F_2$ 分别是 $C$ 的左、右焦点，$P$ 是 $C$ 上的一点，且 $|PF_1|=1$，则 $|PF_2|=$（　　）

A. $1$ 　B. $2$ 　C. $3$ 　D. $4$

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="gaokao_m1_02_q1"></div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 200, margin = {top: 15, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const svg = d3.select("#gaokao_m1_02_q1").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const cx = w/2, cy = h/2;
  // Ellipse x²/4+y²/3=1: a=2, b=√3, c=1
  const a = 2, b = Math.sqrt(3), c = 1, s = 60;

  // axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // ellipse
  const pts = d3.range(0, 2*Math.PI+0.05, 0.04).map(t =>
    [cx + a*s*Math.cos(t), cy + b*s*Math.sin(t)]);
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line()(pts)+"Z")
    .attr("fill", "rgba(45,112,179,0.06)").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // foci F₁(-1,0), F₂(1,0)
  const f1x = cx - c*s, f2x = cx + c*s;
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f1x).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f2x).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f1x).attr("y", cy+18).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₁");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f2x).attr("y", cy+18).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₂");

  // Point P: |PF₁|=1. Since a=2, c=1, min dist to F₁ is a-c=1 → P is at right vertex (2,0)
  // Actually |PF₁|=1 means P is near F₁. Let's find: for a general point,
  // |PF₁|=1 and |PF₁|+|PF₂|=4, so |PF₂|=3
  // |PF₁|=a+ex=1 → 2+x/2=1 → x=-2? No: |PF₁|=a+ex (for left focus)
  // Actually for left focus: |PF₁|=a+ex (x can be negative)
  // a+ex = 1 → 2 + (1/2)x = 1 → x = -2. So P is at left vertex (-2,0), |PF₁|=a-c=1 ✓
  const px = cx - a*s, py = cy;
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", px).attr("cy", py).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#2d70b3");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", px-8).attr("y", py-10).attr("font-size", "12px")
    .attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("P");

  // line PF₁
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", px).attr("y1", py).attr("x2", f1x).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  svg.append("text").attr("x", (px+f1x)/2).attr("y", cy-10).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("fill", "#e67e22").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("|PF₁|=1");

  // line PF₂
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", px).attr("y1", py).attr("x2", f2x).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  svg.append("text").attr("x", (px+f2x)/2).attr("y", cy+16).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("fill", "#27ae60").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("|PF₂|=?");

  // Sum label
  svg.append("text").attr("x", w-10).attr("y", 18).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("font-weight", "bold")
    .text("|PF₁|+|PF₂| = 2a = 4");
})();
</script>
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

椭圆 $\dfrac{x^2}{4}+\dfrac{y^2}{3}=1$ 中，$a^2=4$，$a=2$。

由椭圆定义：$|PF_1|+|PF_2|=2a=4$。

因为 $|PF_1|=1$，所以 $|PF_2|=4-1=3$。

**答案：C**
:::
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2018年 全国II卷 第10题

已知椭圆 $C: \dfrac{x^2}{a^2}+\dfrac{y^2}{b^2}=1\ (a>b>0)$ 的左、右焦点分别为 $F_1, F_2$，$P$ 是椭圆 $C$ 上的一点，$|PF_1|+|PF_2|=12$，且 $\triangle PF_1F_2$ 的周长为 $22$，则椭圆的焦距为（　　）

A. $8$ 　B. $10$ 　C. $12$ 　D. $14$

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="gaokao_m1_02_q2"></div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 200, margin = {top: 15, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const svg = d3.select("#gaokao_m1_02_q2").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const cx = w/2, cy = h/2;
  // 2a=12 → a=6, perimeter=22 → 2c=10 → c=5, b=√(36-25)=√11
  const a = 6, c = 5, b = Math.sqrt(11), s = 13;

  // axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx-a*s-20).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", cx+a*s+20).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // ellipse
  const pts = d3.range(0, 2*Math.PI+0.05, 0.04).map(t =>
    [cx + a*s*Math.cos(t), cy + b*s*Math.sin(t)]);
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line()(pts)+"Z")
    .attr("fill", "rgba(45,112,179,0.06)").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // foci
  const f1x = cx - c*s, f2x = cx + c*s;
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f1x).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f2x).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f1x).attr("y", cy+18).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₁");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f2x).attr("y", cy+18).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₂");

  // Point P on ellipse (upper portion)
  const theta = Math.PI * 0.35;
  const px = cx + a*s*Math.cos(theta), py = cy - b*s*Math.sin(theta);
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", px).attr("cy", py).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#2d70b3");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", px+8).attr("y", py-8).attr("font-size", "13px")
    .attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("P");

  // Triangle PF₁F₂
  svg.append("polygon")
    .attr("points", `${px},${py} ${f1x},${cy} ${f2x},${cy}`)
    .attr("fill", "rgba(230,126,34,0.1)").attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 1.5);

  // Labels
  svg.append("text").attr("x", (px+f1x)/2-12).attr("y", (py+cy)/2-2).attr("font-size", "10px")
    .attr("fill", "#e67e22").text("|PF₁|");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", (px+f2x)/2+5).attr("y", (py+cy)/2-2).attr("font-size", "10px")
    .attr("fill", "#27ae60").text("|PF₂|");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", cx).attr("y", cy+16).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "10px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("|F₁F₂| = 2c = ?");

  // Info
  svg.append("text").attr("x", w-5).attr("y", 16).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("font-weight", "bold")
    .text("周长 = |PF₁|+|PF₂|+|F₁F₂| = 12+2c = 22");
})();
</script>
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

由椭圆定义：$|PF_1|+|PF_2|=2a=12$，所以 $a=6$。

$\triangle PF_1F_2$ 的周长 $= |PF_1|+|PF_2|+|F_1F_2| = 12 + 2c = 22$

所以 $2c=10$，焦距为 $10$。

**答案：B**
:::
:::

## 本课要点

::: {.callout-important}
## 记住这些

1. **椭圆的定义**：平面上到两个定点（焦点）距离之和为常数（$2a$）的点的轨迹
2. **离心率** $e = c/a$ 决定椭圆的"扁"程度：$e=0$ 是圆，$e$ 越大越扁
3. **焦点越分散**，椭圆越扁；**焦点越集中**，椭圆越圆
4. 椭圆的反射性质：从一个焦点发出的光（声波）都会汇聚到另一个焦点
:::
